reviews.review_description: A little hard in the beginning but super cool. The graphics are decent but the best thing about the game is the level design and ambience. Nothing beats flying in formation with a rocket going in space.

This is one of the best VR games the more I play it the more immersive it's unbelievable I actually feel like I'm flying to the point of having fear of crashing my jet , would be great if they made the jet with low power and worked upgrades to max power and higher ranks greater jet , they could make money by selling the f22 raptor in this simulation, I would also buy the f35 or other foreign designs to see their full potential in simulation and combat against online or AI
This has massive potential - well done devs keep at it

As what you would expect from a game about a display flight squadron, the game requires incredibly exact and precise maneuvering. This game is not for those who are just looking for a casual flight simulator.

Out of all the flying game I have played this has to be the best game out of all and the music goes along very well. I just wish that the game released the music to listen to without playing the game.
I know it’s early access so it’s not gonna be good but just trust the process you never know we might get multiplayer so trust the process ￼￼
Wipeout 2097 x Top Gun and better than flying a cargo plane full of rubber dog**** out of Hong Kong. Genuinely a good game once you get the hang of it and the sfx/music is worth the price of entry.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to write this review! Glad you like our game - there's still a long way to go. PS I think you might be a 90s kid... :)
